message:
🐛 Fix inconsistent component patterns (#2562)

Replace raw <button> elements with shared Button component in
StatsConfig, CardControls, ClusterSelect, and ClusterFilterDropdown
to standardize component patterns flagged by Auto-QA consistency check.

Fixes #2323

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
